mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO top_inst (trade_date, ts_code, exalter, side, buy, buy_rate, sell, sell_rate, net_buy) VALUES
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.exalter}, #{i.side}, #{i.buy}, #{i.buyRate}, #{i.sell}, #{i.sellRate}, #{i.netBuy})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM top_inst WHERE (trade_date, ts_code, exalter, side) IN
(#{i.tradeDate}, #{i.tsCode}, #{i.exalter}, #{i.side})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM top_inst WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate} AND ((side = 'Buy' AND (buy = 0 OR buy IS NULL)) OR (side = 'Sell' AND (sell = 0 OR sell IS NULL)))
